notes: MiniMax M2.7 AutoRound W4A16 on 4x Intel Arc Pro B70 via vLLM/XPU TP4. Strict quality gate passed before benchmarking: raw145 exact token hashes at n64/n256, semantic suite, 16-run arithmetic repeat, and extended sixpack. This run uses exact MiniMax router logits into llm-scaler ESIMD work-sharing INT4 MoE decode, default XPU FlashAttention v2, PIECEWISE XPU graph, block-size 256, max_num_batched_tokens 512, prefix cache disabled, async engine, greedy temperature 0. New clean-path change: VLLM_MINIMAX_QK_RMS_DIRECT_INPLACE_SCALE=1 calls vllm.all_reduce_inplace directly for decode-sized FP32 Q/K variance tensors (numel<=2), then scales qk_var in-place. Four p512/n1536 repeats: 88.739272, 88.302351, 88.821529, and 88.144660 output tok/s; mean 88.501953 output tok/s and 118.002604 total tok/s. This is a small clean-path improvement over the prior Q/K-helper result, without the PyTorch alias warning from the faster skip-clone headline. No speculative decoding, no expert dropping, no router approximation, no quality-reducing quant change, no power-limit change. Caveat: one benchmark log printed Bad address (src/pipe.cpp:367) during shutdown after successful JSON write; recorded as shutdown noise to monitor.

engineFlags.commandSnippet: VLLM_MINIMAX_QK_RMS_XPU_HELPER=1 VLLM_MINIMAX_QK_RMS_XPU_HELPER_MAX_TOKENS=4 VLLM_MINIMAX_QK_RMS_DIRECT_INPLACE_SCALE=1 VLLM_XPU_COMPILE_ALLREDUCE_CUSTOM_OP=1 VLLM_XPU_CUSTOM_ALLREDUCE_CLONE_INPUT=1 VLLM_XPU_CUSTOM_ALLREDUCE_SKIP_CLONE_FP32_MAX_NUMEL=0 VLLM_XPU_CUSTOM_ALLREDUCE_TINY_FP32_INPLACE_MAX_NUMEL=2 VLLM_XPU_CUSTOM_ALLREDUCE_INPLACE_MAX_NUMEL=0 VLLM_XPU_USE_LLM_SCALER_MOE=1 VLLM_XPU_USE_LLM_SCALER_MOE_WS=1 VLLM_XPU_USE_LLM_SCALER_MOE_MINIMAX_LOGITS_WS=1 VLLM_MINIMAX_M2_ATTN_DELAY_ALLREDUCE=0 VLLM_XPU_ENABLE_XPU_GRAPH=1 VLLM_XPU_FORCE_GRAPH_WITH_COMM=1 VLLM_XPU_GRAPH_NOOP_COMM_CAPTURE=1 VLLM_MINIMAX_QK_NORM_RESTORE_WEIGHT=1 VLLM_MINIMAX_QK_NORM_RESTORE_WEIGHT_MIN_TOKENS=2 CCL_TOPO_P2P_ACCESS=1 ONEAPI_DEVICE_SELECTOR=level_zero:0,1,2,3 ZE_AFFINITY_MASK=0,1,2,3 vllm bench throughput --backend vllm --model /mnt/fast-ai/llm-models/minimax-m2.7-int4-autoround --tokenizer /mnt/fast-ai/llm-models/minimax-m2.7-int4-autoround --trust-remote-code --dtype float16 --tensor-parallel-size 4 --distributed-executor-backend mp --max-model-len 2048 --max-num-batched-tokens 512 --max-num-seqs 1 --dataset-name random --random-input-len 512 --random-output-len 1536 --random-range-ratio 0 --num-prompts 1 --disable-log-stats --async-engine --block-size 256 --no-enable-prefix-caching --compilation-config {"use_inductor_graph_partition":true,"compile_sizes":[1],"cudagraph_mode":"PIECEWISE"}
engineFlags.extraFlags: XPU/Level Zero; exact MiniMax router-logits to work-sharing u4 MoE path selected by VLLM_XPU_USE_LLM_SCALER_MOE_MINIMAX_LOGITS_WS=1; delayed attention allreduce disabled; alias-correct tiny FP32 in-place no-return op for numel<=2; Q/K RMS XPU helper enabled for decode tokens<=4; direct in-place Q/K variance allreduce+scale enabled; default XPU FlashAttention v2; PIECEWISE XPU graph with communicator capture guard; strict quality hashes preserved; no power-limit change
